brief: EU fines Google €890m for antitrust violations; US-Saudi nuclear deal prompts nonproliferation fears; oil prices near $100 amid Houthi and Iran tensions; new papers introduce AI-augmented lab workflows and a taxonomy for edge bundling.
news_summary: EU fines Google €890m for search and app anti-competitive practices; US and Saudi Arabia sign landmark nuclear cooperation agreement; oil prices near $100 as Houthis attack Red Sea tankers and US strikes Iran; Ukraine escalates long-range attacks on Russian commercial warehouses.
papers_summary: New research includes a HIPAA-compliant AI LIMS architecture (FMRP-LEAN) for clinical assays, a task taxonomy for edge bundling in visualization, and a benchmark (MV-Bench) for multimodal LLMs in multi-view interface construction.

en.brief: EU fines Google €890m for antitrust violations; US-Saudi nuclear deal prompts nonproliferation fears; oil prices near $100 amid Houthi and Iran tensions; new papers introduce AI-augmented lab workflows and a taxonomy for edge bundling.
en.news_summary: EU fines Google €890m for search and app anti-competitive practices; US and Saudi Arabia sign landmark nuclear cooperation agreement; oil prices near $100 as Houthis attack Red Sea tankers and US strikes Iran; Ukraine escalates long-range attacks on Russian commercial warehouses.
en.papers_summary: New research includes a HIPAA-compliant AI LIMS architecture (FMRP-LEAN) for clinical assays, a task taxonomy for edge bundling in visualization, and a benchmark (MV-Bench) for multimodal LLMs in multi-view interface construction.

zh.brief: 香港47人案被告胡志偉在英機場險被遣返，台灣收緊陸配參政權，美沙核協議引發核擴散擔憂；歐盟對Google罰款8.9億歐元，油價逼近100美元。研究方面關注AI輔助臨床檢測工作流優化及可視化任務分類。
zh.news_summary: 香港民主派前議員胡志偉在倫敦希斯羅機場被扣留後獲准入境，台灣修法將陸配參選資格改為「除籍滿十年」，美沙簽署核能合作協議可能加劇中東核擴散風險。中國電影《澎湖海戰》傳出撤檔，TikTok直播帶貨在英國興起。
zh.papers_summary: 兩篇arXiv論文分別提出HIPAA合規的AI增強臨床檢測LIMS架構（FMRP-LEAN）和邊緣捆綁可視化任務分類法（Task Taxonomy for Edge and Trail Bundling），旨在優化工作流與提升可視化理解。

todays_image.caption: Just as Lobophora sp. clings stubbornly to reefs, the political entanglements of former Hong Kong legislator Hu Zhiwei followed him across the ocean, nearly snagging him on a UK runway.
todays_image.title: Lobophora sp.
